## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` and `make lint` pass
- [ ] No new dependencies, or they are mature and at least 14 days old
- [ ] `uv.lock` updated if dependencies changed
- [ ] Workflow changes use GitHub-owned actions pinned to commit hashes
- [ ] README / AGENTS.md updated if behavior or process changed
